title: Actual JSON completion-cost corpus for ordinary AW outputs

retention.reason: retained closeout evidence summarizes the #1691 slice for #1680 continuation
retention.ordinary_route: agentic-workspace summary --format json or report --section closeout_report --format json
retention.trust_rule: When this record exists, agents should trust it as the closeout handoff surface for #1691 without replaying the full branch conversation.
retention.rule: Retained closeout evidence preserves reportable closeout facts for completed lane slices.

active_milestone.scope: Implement repeatable actual JSON completion-cost corpus analysis for ordinary AW outputs.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Representative actual-JSON corpus and analyzer for ordinary AW output completion-cost ranking.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add a new ordinary-loop surface; do not optimize for bytes alone; keep reductions as candidates until behavior and safety proof exists.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Corpus command set, measurement heuristics, fixture shape, and focused proof.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Work changes into long-horizon evaluation, ordinary output behavior changes, or field removal.

execution_run.what happened: Added maintainer-facing actual JSON corpus analyzer with live ordinary AW command capture and deterministic fixture tests.
execution_run.scope touched: scripts/check checker, focused tests, and #1680/#1691 planning records
execution_run.result for continuation: continue from #1680 lane; next slice is long-horizon behavior evidence through #1602, using Codex GPT 5.3 Spark or GPT 5.4 Mini for evaluations.
execution_run.next step: Promote long-horizon behavior evidence or a selected #1602 evaluation slice before running evaluations.

finished_run_review.scope respected: Scope stayed maintainer/evaluation-facing; no ordinary command output behavior changed; #1680 remains open for behavior proof, reductions, and before/after evidence.
finished_run_review.config compliance: used existing scripts/check maintainer path and focused tests
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: Use corpus ranked observations to choose behavior probes and reduction candidates.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_completion_cost_json_corpus.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_completion_cost_json_corpus.py --format text --timeout-seconds 60; uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_completion_cost_json_corpus.py tests/test_completion_cost_json_corpus.py; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace
proof_report.proof achieved now: yes; live corpus captured and analyzed four ordinary JSON samples.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Live analyzer output reported 4 analyzed samples and ranked observations including implement context, start context, summary/continuation or residue governance, and doctor installed-state compatibility.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: GitHub #1691 actual JSON completion-cost corpus for ordinary AW outputs.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The corpus analyzer defines representative ordinary JSON commands, records field-size rankings, empty/default ratios, repeated strings, prose/share, actionability and selector signals, duplicate concepts, cost type, owner surface, and candidate measurement/reduction.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #1691 has no unsolved slice intent; #1680 parent remains open for behavior proof, reductions, and before/after evidence.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #1691 measurement support is present, but #1680 still needs long-horizon behavior evidence, at least one reduction, and before/after proof.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #1691 if the corpus cannot be rerun before/after a reduction or stops producing ranked actual-output candidates.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Actual JSON measurements can expose runtime-heavy surfaces that static schema analysis cannot rank by itself.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Use measured samples to pick behavior probes and reductions rather than optimizing static suspects blindly.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: When selecting the next reduction or behavior-proof slice, inspect the corpus ranked observations first. Dogfooding friction routed to https://github.com/rickardvh/agentic-workspace/issues/1706.
